title: Passwords & Personal Info
subtitle: Keeping Personal Information Safe Online
overview: Students learn why passwords and personal information must stay private through storytelling and discussion activities.
keyTopics: Never share personal details with strangers

story.title: Riya Learns Online Safety
story.content: Riya was playing an online game when a stranger asked her name and birthday. Riya remembered her teacher's advice. She did not share her information and told her parents. Riya learned that passwords, birthdays, and personal information should stay private to stay safe online.

safetyRules: Do not share your birthday online.
Do not tell strangers your name, address, or school details.
Ask an adult if someone asks for personal information.

quiz.q: Should you share your password with strangers?

quiz.explanation: Personal information should not be shared online.

quiz.q: What should you do if someone online asks personal questions?
quiz.explanation: Always ask a trusted adult for help.
